depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the element this ontology table row is associated with.

fields.name: names
fields.documentation: Comma-separated human-readable labels for each column in the table row. The number of entries must match variable_names and ontology_nodes.

fields.name: variable_names
fields.documentation: Comma-separated variable names that serve as the keys in the data structure. The number of entries must match names and ontology_nodes.

fields.name: ontology_nodes
fields.documentation: Comma-separated ontology node identifiers (e.g., 'EMPTY:0000103') for each column. The number of entries must match names and variable_names.

fields.name: data
fields.documentation: A structure whose keys are the entries of variable_names and whose values are the data for this table row. Values may be strings, numbers, or NaN. Requires a special evaluator: the keys must match the comma-separated entries in variable_names exactly, and the counts of names, variable_names, and ontology_nodes must all agree.
